subject: Getting more 5-star reviews on autopilot
body:
Hi,

I came across Dallas Dental Smiles and noticed you have solid reviews. But getting patients to leave reviews is usually a manual ask, and most practices only capture a fraction of their happy patients.

We help dental offices set up automated review requests. After each appointment, patients get a friendly text asking about their experience. Happy patients get directed to Google, and any concerns come to you privately first.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
